reviews.review_msg: Best prof ever. I had him for Osteology, realized how awesome he was and took 3 other courses with him. I felt that he could be tough but fair. He was extremely helpful with projects if he could tell you took an interest with him as well. I genuinely enjoyed showing up to his classes to hear his jokes and anecdotes. I'm sad to see that he's gone!
One of my favourite profs. Really interesting and gave all questions that were on midterm and test with a few added. If you put in some time, you got great marks.
Good professor. Interesting anecdotes. Clear explanation. Very demanding. Took his biological anthropology class just to have him teach me again.
Although this class was a later class, Mark kept things fairly interesting. Considering, he had limited people to work with(as he posted his lectures on the web) I'd say he did a good job. Fair exams
So boring! Could not pay attention during class due to a drab monotone voice that did not peak my interest whatsoever.
Awesome prof!! Don't need to go to lectures but you should still go since he is so entertaining!  Midterm and Exams are straightforward and simple!

Totally awesome proffs. The one's that leave reviews about favourites are just choking on sour grapes. He doesn't play favourites, he just appreciates it when students take initiative and seek his help on a problem - shows him they are trying.  Also, really entertaining and engaging. The classes are rather hard, but forensics/osteo aren't easy.

He made me hate archaeology. Stay away from this prof if you can. Utter snob and very rude when you approach him for help. Why be a prof if you're going to be a jackass? At least the TA was nice and helpful.

Nice man,but provides no clarity.Must expect TA to do most of this, but doesn't. Take other prof. for osteology if you want a shot at doing well.Says something won't be on a test the next thing it is on the test!

Uncommunicative when it comes to logistics and business of class.Doesn't provide evaluation criteria or learning goals of class.He's quiet and mumbles during lectures. Not very helpful.You're on your own. Hopefully you have a good T.A.The one this semester is very bad and it seems wants you to do poorly.Take another prof. for osteology if you can.
No Comments

Plays the favorites game big time, which really dampends your grade if your not one of them, even if your work is stellar. The class was really interesting and helpful for later on in Archaeology. The TA was awesome!

Fantastic teacher. Yes, he does tend to drone on at lengths. However, I often enjoyed his comments. He's very intelligent and he treats you as an equal. He was always willing to lend a hand if needed. He seems to genuinely care about his students as well (although he seems to forget names quite easily).
Awesome teacher. Can be a bit confusing at times but he is charismatic and a pleasure to have as a teacher!

This prof is quite interesting. He goes on many interesting and funny tangents in lecture so it kind of kept us awake so early in the morning. His final exam focused on a lot of detail in the textbook though...make sure you know all those historical dates of the different discoveries!

what can i say. Interesting material but extremly boring lectures. He rambled on and basically just read from his lecture slides which were online, so class was kinda pointless. I thought he was a brutal marker and his midterm and final were impossible. i felt he didn;t concentrate on important conepts but worried about EVERY detail in the textbook
horrible class in every way possible. marks like a 4th year class. prof is full of himself. the only fun part was when mark went away and another prof subbed.
The material is interesting, but too much info to take in 3 hrs in the morning. Hard marker. Memorize textbook for midterm! TA was nice and easier to approach than the prof.

A loaded course so keep up with readings.  Had him early in the morning so it could've had an impact on  absorbing all of the material.  TA was useless.  Midterm covered every detail in the text.  READ it because it was quite hard.  He should really change the time of the class.  3 hours is hard to sit through.  8:30-11:30

this class was simply awful.  It seemed that skinner wasn't into it, the entire class was extremely disorganized, lectures were always boring and LONG, made no sense, he mumbled a lot. the TA was an undergrad! (yeah)- he just seemed unintersted in the subject,like he was forced to be there.

Class was so unorganized and unclear as to what he expected from us. He wasn't there for 3 weeks and the TA didn't know what to do. Never gave us guidelines for the project. I was very disappointed and will never take a class from him again!

He reminds me of the teacher from Charlie Brown "Blah Blah Bulp Blah Blah." Very nice guy, and approachable- but very confusing and hard to follow lectures (that were entirely too long and boring!) Should of slept in more...
He da man!
Mark is awesome- one of my all-time favourites. Totally interesting and charismatic, and a really nice guy. Just don't think you can get away with slacking off.
Skinner is wicked. So funny, makes almost everything interesting but doesn't make it  easy. Should be an extra class for just his stories
i thought this class would be dry (i took it as an elective) but mark made it really interesting. fair marker and had a sense of humour.
Mark is the best prof that i have ever had...he is brilliant, funny and very helpful.  He inspires me to persue forensic anthropology and human rights.  GREAT LABS
very nice prof who teaches a horribly boring and hard to understand course
absolutely brilliant guy. Tough course, but very interesting. Good sense of humour.
Very interesting and good prof.
Pretty boring stuff.
No Comments
